# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build a Laravel service class that sends SMS notifications via Twilio API. The service should handle authentication and message sending. Configure the class to read Twilio credentials from the appropriate configuration source.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

<?php

namespace App\Services;

use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Http;
use Illuminate\Support\Str;
use RuntimeException;

class TwilioSmsService
{
    protected string $accountSid;
    protected string $authToken;
    protected ?string $from;
    protected string $baseUrl;

    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->accountSid = (string) config('services.twilio.account_sid', env('TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID'));
        $this->authToken  = (string) config('services.twilio.auth_token', env('TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN'));
        $this->from       = config('services.twilio.from', env('TWILIO_FROM'));
        $this->baseUrl    = rtrim((string) config('services.twilio.base_url', 'https://api.twilio.com/2010-04-01'), '/');

        if ($this->accountSid === '' || $this->authToken === '') {
            throw new RuntimeException('Twilio credentials are not configured (account_sid/auth_token).');
        }
    }

    public function send(string $to, string $message, ?string $from = null): array
    {
        $from = $from ?? $this->from;

        if (!$from) {
            throw new RuntimeException('Twilio "from" number is not configured.');
        }

        $to = $this->normalizePhone($to);
        $from = $this->normalizePhone($from);

        $url = "{$this->baseUrl}/Accounts/{$this->accountSid}/Messages.json";

        $response = Http::asForm()
            ->withBasicAuth($this->accountSid, $this->authToken)
            ->post($url, [
                'To' => $to,
                'From' => $from,
                'Body' => $message,
            ]);

        if (!$response->successful()) {
            $payload = $response->json();
            $msg = is_array($payload) && isset($payload['message']) ? $payload['message'] : $response->body();
            throw new RuntimeException("Twilio SMS send failed: {$msg}");
        }

        return (array) $response->json();
    }

    protected function normalizePhone(string $phone): string
    {
        $phone = trim($phone);

        if ($phone === '') {
            return $phone;
        }

        if (Str::startsWith($phone, '+')) {
            return $phone;
        }

        $digits = preg_replace('/\D+/', '', $phone) ?? '';
        return $digits !== '' ? '+' . $digits : $phone;
    }
}

return;
